shorts.title: The Titanic Iceberg Metaphor in Politics
shorts.reason: The speaker uses a vivid hand gesture and Titanic metaphor to illustrate political foresight and public delay, creating a strong conceptual hook.

shorts.title: Hilarious Reaction to Carlos Bolsonaro's Campaign
shorts.reason: The speaker mockingly agrees with Carlos Bolsonaro's campaign statements with high energy and sarcastic humor, delivering a highly entertaining reaction.
